---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for Nexus
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
Thanks for the idea. Nexus aims to put the whole station in one modern app
without hiding the radio. Concrete, scoped proposals are easier to act on than
broad wishes.
-->

## Problem

<!-- What problem are you trying to solve, or what is awkward today? Describe the operating situation, not just the feature. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What you'd like Nexus to do. Be as specific as you can about UI, behavior, and on-air implications. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about, existing workarounds, or how other apps (WSJT-X / JTDX / JS8Call) handle this. -->

## Which area does this touch?

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] **Operate — digital** (FT8/FT4 decodes, roster, sequencer, waterfall, FT1/DX1 chat)
- [ ] **Phone / CW** (bandscope, voice keyer, CW keyer/decoder)
- [ ] **Connect** (map, propagation, band openings, panes)
- [ ] **DX chasing** (Needed board, DXpeditions, awards, Journey)
- [ ] **Satellites / rotator**
- [ ] **Logbook / QSL** (ADIF, LoTW / QRZ / ClubLog / eQSL / HRDLog)
- [ ] **Rig control & setup** (CAT / PTT / audio, wizard, rig detection)
- [ ] **Modem** (libft1 — FT1 / DX1 waveform, decode pipeline)
- [ ] **Interop** (WSJT-X UDP, GridTracker/JTAlert, N1MM/N3FJP, PSK Reporter, cluster)
- [ ] **Field Day / POTA / SOTA**
- [ ] Other / not sure

## Additional context

<!-- Mockups, references, links, or anything else. -->
